_comment: Manual coordinate overrides for spots whose seed-time geocoding put them in the wrong place. Applied by pipeline/cleanup_spots.py. Each entry is matched by exact name.

Aviones.note: Known Isla Verde beach break; seed coords placed it in Chihuahua, Mexico.

Antonio's Rincon.note: Puerto Rico point break near Rincon; seed coords placed it off Venezuela.

Mondos.note: Ventura-county beach break; seed coords placed it in inland Northern California.

Rockpile.note: Santa Barbara-area reef; seed coords placed it in the Coachella Valley.
